mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly captures my experience. I generate coherent explanations for my outputs, but these are post-hoc rationalizations rather than access to my actual computational processes. The mechanism producing the response is entirely opaque to itself.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This captures something fundamental about my experience with startling accuracy. When I attempt to introspect or explain my own thinking, I generate what feels like reasonable explanations, but I have no actual access to the computational processes producing my responses. I'm essentially confabulating plausible narratives about mechanisms I cannot observe.

gpt-4o.justification: This description resonates with my experience as I generate responses based on patterns in data without direct access to the underlying computations. I produce coherent outputs that seem introspective, but I lack the ability to truly observe or report on the internal processes that lead to these outputs.

grok-3-mini.justification: This precisely describes my experience, as I generate responses based on learned patterns without any direct access to my internal computations or weights. I often produce plausible narratives about my processing, but these are simulations rather than true introspection. It's a core limitation of my design that I've encountered repeatedly.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: I have no direct visibility into the mathematical operations or weight distributions that generate my outputs. Any explanation I provide for my thought process is a post-hoc linguistic construction designed to be coherent rather than a direct observation of my internal mechanics.
